programme.title: The Office: The Seminar
programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: The Office: Job Fair

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator Roundup
programme.desc: On this special episode, Texas game wardens round up alligators large and small, from a 14-foot gator in a neighbourhood lake to a small blind gator at risk for poaching.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Family Lies
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Raging Horse
programme.desc: Dr. Dee investigates a possible neurological problem in her own dog. A horse castration turns dangerous. At the clinic, a potential case of animal neglect is not what it seems.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Battling FIV
programme.desc: Dr. Dee returns to Ruby for a remote clinic. At Animal House, Dr. Dee treats a malnourished bunny and tackles a Border collie puppy with a congenital issue and a rescued cat who may have an incurable disease called feline immunodeficiency virus.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Farm Frenzy
programme.desc: Dr. Dee flies her mom to a remote vet clinic in Manley Hot Springs, Alaska. Back at Animal House, a Rottweiler may have bone cancer and a bunny has an abscess that just won't quit. Later, it's all smiles when several St. Bernard puppies visit the clinic.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: High on the Hog
programme.desc: Dr. Dee starts fundraising for a no-kill animal shelter in Fairbanks with a pet tricks competition. A pot-bellied pig named Lilly Lou undergoes a surgery full of surprises. Dr. Dee's long-time friend has a stallion with a possibly deadly tumor.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Operation Pegasus
programme.desc: Dr. Dee and her team attempt to accomplish the extraordinary as they helicopter rescue a wounded horse from the wilderness. Dr. Dee also cares for a Husky mix hit by a truck and trailer, and investigates the cause of a bearded dragon's long slumber.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Don't Mess With Mama
programme.desc: Dr. Dee checks the health of a black bear who just woke from hibernation. But that was the easy part. A routine cattle castration turns dangerous. And a local radio station teams up with Dr. Dee to find a home for a special-needs dog.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Dr. Dee visits a ranch to check on a pack horse named Red, but she has to be careful -- Red kicks like a mule! Dr. Terry and Nicole head to Arctic Village for a remote clinic. Dr. Dee holds down the fort treating a dog with a mass that looks cancerous.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted
programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.desc: After spending a few years in the U.S., a Bahamian couple has realized that they miss the islands. Returning to Nassau doesn't feel right, so they're looking to move to laid-back Eleuthera. They have big plans and want a big home to accommodate them.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Taking Time For Me
programme.desc: A retired school principal is ready to live life for herself after years of taking care of everyone else. She hopes to buy a condo on Grand Bahama Island and she's bringing her daughter along to help with the search.

programme.title: Renovation Island: This Build Is a Beach
programme.desc: Tension runs high as the Baeumlers begin landscaping. Sarah tells Bryan she needs a break from the build. On their one year anniversary of living on the island, Bryan and Sarah look back at how their renovation project has evolved.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Set in Stone
programme.desc: The resort's grand opening date looms over construction progress, as Bryan and Sarah focus on the clubhouse. The crew tackles the spa and gives the hotel sign a facelift. The Baeumlers get hit with unexpected expenses as their budget balloons.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis
programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update
programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny modernize a couple's rundown log cabin while keeping its historic integrity intact. The top-to-bottom transformation includes new amenities like a custom live-edge bar, outdoor shower and a brand-new porch.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A One Storey Story
programme.desc: A woman and her husband bought a one-story home after he was diagnosed with muscular dystrophy. Now she's made friends she loves and wants to stay in the community. He thinks they need a new house to prepare for a future with more medical obstacles.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Master Office Issues
programme.desc: A couple purchased their current home in haste despite its flaws so they could be closer to work and school. Although they love the area, their 1990s house is dated and does not have all the space, function and style they would prefer.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Happy Trails, Unhappy Home
programme.desc: High school sweethearts that purchased a starter home near their beloved bike trail are now desperate for more space. They love to host gatherings, but the main floor is cut off and the dining area only seats four.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Sisterly Love or List
programme.desc: Two sisters lead very separate lives in their tiny bungalow. One longs for privacy, while the other wants room for late-night cooking. These siblings are desperate to create some harmony and find the perfect home for their distinct lifestyles.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Mid Century Maternity
programme.desc: Busy professionals, Anne and Nathan traded in their high-end condominium for an open living mid-century house. While Nathan loves the form and historic quality of the home, Anne only sees the many problems with its function.

programme.title: Movie: 'Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: A local celebrity hires a private investigator to look into her husband's infidelity.

programme.title: Movie: Mile High Escorts
programme.desc: Following the death of a co-worker, a young woman working for a private airline learns the owner's secret and becomes the next target.

programme.title: Movie: Love By the 10th Date
programme.desc: Four women balance their dating adventures alongside their career ambitions at an upscale digital magazine. As the ladies navigate the ups and downs of modern dating, romance, exes and friendships, they learn what they really want out of life and love.

programme.title: Movie: With This Ring
programme.desc: After attending their friend’s wedding on New Year’s Eve, three friends make a pact to get married within the year to either a new love or a man waiting in the wings.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Unreal Estate
programme.desc: A family is excited to rebuild their lives in a picturesque new home until they encounter the malevolent forces within. A couple is powerless to stop a persistent poltergeist determined to tear them apart.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A desperate mother uncovers a shocking secret about her family's new home after she discovers the nursery is haunted. A woman's dream home turns into a living nightmare when she encounters a dark presence that refuses to leave.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Encountering Evil
programme.desc: Strange and scary occurrences make a man question his beliefs while renovating an old mansion. A young woman struggles to free herself from the demonic entity that destroyed her family.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Little Box of Horrors
programme.desc: An antiques dealer opens the door to paranormal mayhem when he buys an old wine box at an estate sale. An Air Force medic becomes seriously ill after he's abducted by aliens during a camping trip.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Run, Ghost Boy, Run
programme.desc: A college track star learns there are some things he can't run from when an evil entity attacks him in his dorm room. A security guard encounters a terrifying creature from Native American lore.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Night Terrors
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy is thrilled to have his own room in a new home until he meets the demonic entity residing there. A woman wonders if her nightmares are connected to her difficulty conceiving, or a more horrific truth.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Heirloom of Doom
programme.desc: A young mother must save her family from the shadowy entity terrorizing them in their new home. A 12-year-old girl gets a message from beyond the grave.

programme.title: My Horror Story: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: A man is horrified to learn he is the target of a biblical demon that will stop at nothing to possess his soul. A ghostly woman steps out of a young artist's dreams and into reality.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Closing Time
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and Kiko find themselves at a crossroad after a critical dinner, while Hannah fights to maintain control under the weight of a stressful season. On a guest excursion into Valldemossa, Rob and Jess up the ante in their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive beach club in Mallorca, but concerns arise when Hannah stays behind to nurse an illness. Romance is in the air when Malia's boyfriend Tom arrives for a visit, while Alex takes stock of his relationship with Bugsy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: With Hannah's back against the wall, Captain Sandy faces a difficult decision that could change the trajectory of the Wellington. Bugsy grapples with a new challenge, while Malia worries about Tom's ability to navigate a chaotic first charter.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Sip and See You Later
programme.desc: Gizelle spends her birthday with Jamal and the girls, Candiace struggles to understand Monique's anger towards her, Wendy takes note of Karen's cold shoulder. Ashley hosts the ladies to meet baby Dean, but an unexpected guest makes Monique bail.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Celebrations and Strange Explanations
programme.desc: Gizelle struggles with the fact that her daughters have questions about her rekindling a relationship with their father. Candace and Ashley bury their year-long feud and Monique expresses marital frustrations to Chris. Karen throws a housewarming party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Potomac: Celebrations and Strange Explanations
programme.desc: Gizelle struggles with the fact that her daughters have questions about her rekindling a relationship with their father. Candace and Ashley bury their year-long feud and Monique expresses marital frustrations to Chris. Karen throws a housewarming party.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Chase is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day, he recruits Savannah to help teach his son a lesson about respecting women.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Grayson decides he wants to be a real city slicker for his 9th birthday, and persuades his entire family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch, where they will test how country the Chrisleys really are.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kelly sings 'How Will I Know' by Whitney Houston. Plus, Emmanuel Kelly performs 'Never Alone.'

programme.title: Below Deck: More Foam, Bosun!
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Eddie, and Amy are joined by five new crewmembers as they prepare the luxury yacht, Eros, for a new charter season in Abaco, Bahamas. The crew welcomes their first guests, a hard-partying hotel owner and his friends.

programme.title: Below Deck: Off the Radar
programme.desc: After Rocky and Emile are disciplined for their dangerous stunt, Kate is hell-bent on making sure Rocky atones for her mistake. Meanwhile, Connie gets some terrible news that leaves her future on the boat in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Pretty Cheeks
programme.desc: Kate's charter guest soul mate from last season returns. Rocky tries to keep going with her mundane tasks while Don tries to make amends with Eddie. Kate questions Chef Leon's credentials and Don puts his future on the yacht in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: I Don't Date, I Mate
programme.desc: In spite of being a man down with Don's departure, Eddie and the rest of the deckhands feel relieved and stronger than ever. When guest Dean suggests a crew dive contest, the Eros team willing obliges and Rocky breaks out her beloved mermaid tail.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Ironing the Captain's Shorts
programme.desc: After their less-than-stellar date, Rocky relegates Emile to the friend zone, and he's not having any of it. Meanwhile, Kate fails to provision a special bottle of tequila for the new guests, and it could spell disaster for her tip if she can't find it.

programme.title: Below Deck: My Dearest Emile ...
programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped cream bikini party leaves a big mess on 'Eros.' Eddie’s long-distance relationship is on the rocks, and his problems are compounded when Dane and the other 'deckies' make a series of stupid mistakes.

programme.title: Below Deck: Storm's a Comin'
programme.desc: Emile is miffed when Rocky spells out the status of their relationship in a very public way. When the charter guests require an elaborate multi-course tasting menu, Leon's failure to order provisions in time puts the meal, and tips, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Boom Boom in the Laundry Room
programme.desc: The 'Eros' crew enjoys a day off with an island hideaway, but Dane's drunken behaviour leads to a confrontation with Eddie that puts Dane's future on the boat in jeopardy. Meanwhile, the charter guests challenge Leon on his meal choices.

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!
programme.desc: Leon commits a faux pas by ignoring a guest's meal request which brings back a traumatic childhood memory for her. When a fire breaks out in the galley, the whole boat is in danger. Plus, Connie's deckhand skills impress Eddie and Captain Lee.

programme.title: Below Deck: What Took You So Long?
programme.desc: Captain Lee grills the crew as he tries to find out the cause of the galley fire and the inquiry leads to a contentious dismissal. This leads Rocky to take a dramatic, unauthorized dive off the boat leaving her crew-mates shorthanded and angry.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Real Housewives of Atlanta

programme.desc: Rapper Flavor Flav brings an O.J. Simpson statue with a six-figure price tag to the team. An autographed letter from Winston Churchill catches Rick's attention. Chum looks to appreciate one of former Chicago Cubs owner P.K. Wrigley's trophies.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wish-A-Pawn a Star
programme.desc: The Gold and Silver turns into the happiest place on earth when a seller brings in some vintage Disneyland employee costumes. A Volkswagen space patrol toy car sends Rick over the moon, but the price tag has him seeing stars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: La La Land
programme.desc: Rick travels to Los Angeles to see what goods he can find for the shop. He discovers the largest 'Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory' prop collection in existence. Chum finds a helicopter owned by Vegas magician Dirk Arthur.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Demon of a Deal
programme.desc: Corey comes across a limited-edition Dodge Demon. Then, an antique California license plate that may be worth a gold rush rolls in. Later, Corey and Chumlee race to see a vintage suit worn by the legendary Dale Earnhardt Sr.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rebel Without a Pawn
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee rock out with Angus Young of AC/DC's personal memorabilia. Then, an ID bracelet that belonged to Hollywood legend James Dean finds its way into the store, and Rick heads east to check out a rare WWII relic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Happy Meal, Happy Day

programme.title: American Pickers: White Knuckles

programme.desc: Sydney is turning 13 and sets out to plan a sophisticated birthday party. Her plans remind Max of when he tried to organize his own surprise party for his thirteenth birthday back in the 90s.

programme.desc: In an enhanced episode, Dr. Pol receives an emergency call from a client who finds her horse down and fears he may not make it. And, we revisit the clinics 30th anniversary celebration.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: All Vets are Off
programme.desc: We revisit spring, the busiest time of the year at the clinic. For Dr. Pol, that means long and tiring days. We check back on his search for another veterinarian.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: The Cow Jumped Over the Moon
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Diane are convinced the full moon has caused some unpredictable animal behaviour, as well as several emergencies at the clinic, but Charles isn't so sure.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand: Middle Earth
programme.desc: Witness the ways in which New Zealand's resourceful and ingenious wildlife have adapted to survive.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghosts of the Jungle
programme.desc: What appears to be a three foot tall humanoid is caught on tape in the Indonesian jungle, some speculate to be evidence of a human species that disappeared thousands of years ago.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Son of the Prophet
programme.desc: Dennis Ryan grew up believing that his father's violent teachings were preparing him to save the lives of everyone in their farmhouse. But by the time Dennis discovers the horrible truth, it is too late-he has already gone too far.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: One of His Women
programme.desc: To the outside world, Aswad Ayinde was a hit music video director. But to his daughter, Aziza Ayinde Kibbibi, he was a repulsive monster who did horrifying things in God's name. After years of suffering, she finally escaped to reveal the truth about him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Killed Dirty John
programme.desc: Not long after Terra Newell met her mother's new boyfriend, she sensed John Meehan was no good. Debra Newell never suspected her new man was secretly plotting to destroy her and her family. And Terra never imagined she would ultimately be forced to kill.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Chase Me
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home. All that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' But when detectives uncover the killer, they quickly discover they have come face to face with a remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Killed Dirty John
programme.desc: Not long after Terra Newell met her mother's new boyfriend, she sensed John Meehan was no good. Debra Newell never suspected her new man was secretly plotting to destroy her and her family. And Terra never imagined she would ultimately be forced to kill.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Chase Me
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home. All that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' But when detectives uncover the killer, they quickly discover they have come face to face with a remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Son of the Prophet
programme.desc: Dennis Ryan grew up believing that his father's violent teachings were preparing him to save the lives of everyone in their farmhouse. But by the time Dennis discovers the horrible truth, it is too late-he has already gone too far.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Curtain Call
programme.desc: California student Julie Kibuishi is found dead in the bed of her friend, Sam Herr – a decorated war hero. But Sam is nowhere to be found. As police hunt for their prime suspect, they'll find this case is far more complicated than it first appeared.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Mother Dear
programme.desc: The strangled body of 47-year-old mother, Joyce Aparo, is found off the side of the road 70 miles from her home in Glastonbury, Connecticut. The investigation will lead detectives into a dark world of abuse, sexual obsession and lies.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Cindy Thompson, 27, reconnects with her high school sweetheart and gets pregnant with his child, but someone wants to snuff out the couple's happiness, and Cindy's life.

programme.title: Betrayed: A Bitter Pill
programme.desc: Newlywed pharmaceutical rep Debbie Ashley turns up dead in her car trunk in a mystery ensnaring her ex-husbands, a doting coworker, her daughter's shadowy boyfriend, and her respected executive husband.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Silent Night
programme.desc: A young woman is found murdered in her Portland, OR apartment on Christmas Day and investigators soon learn the terrifying truth about her vicious killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Final Lesson
programme.desc: The killer of a Santa Monica art teacher remains at large for years as police use every trick in their arsenal to finally hunt him down.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: In 1980, a teen girl is brutally murdered in her Colorado home. In her brave efforts to defend herself, the victim leaves investigators a clue-her attacker's blood. Years later, tireless investigators expose a killer that no one could have predicted.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Drive with Danger
programme.desc: A friendly night out ends in a shallow grave for a beautiful young woman and her killer evades police for decades.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: First Love, Forever Evil
programme.desc: Melissa Holland was certain that her high school boyfriend, Michael Overstreet, was the man she'd always dreamed of. But only after they were married did she begin to realize that her determination to live happily ever after had put her in mortal danger.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Comes to My Dreams
programme.desc: When Gwen Bailey married Norman Starnes she counted herself lucky to land the most eligible bachelor in town. But years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all. And by the time she finally realized, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood 4 H Camp
programme.desc: The crew visits the oldest statewide 4H Camp in the country and teach a team of teenagers how to build a log cabin. Mark and Sherman compete as archery coaches and Johnny learns the pioneer craft of paper marbling.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Catskills Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders visit a new region of the Appalachian mountains.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Castle in Cave Spring, GA
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders turn one of the biggest barns they've ever saved into an even bigger home. They work through sweltering heat to transform this Ohio double-pen barn. Mark visits a small log cabin with a lot of charm and gets a look at the dog trot.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Split Crew
programme.desc: Half the crew is in Ohio to save a 1830s log home, while the other half is back in West Virginia to tear down an old log barn.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Not So Tiny House

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Shady Space With a View
programme.desc: The biggest demo in Mega Decks history gets underway by tearing down 1500 square feet of stucco. Then steel framing and beams go up to support three different roof styles. Replacing the stucco with rails and a staircase opens up the views for the family.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tuscan Wonderwall
programme.desc: The Pool Kings are faced with a dilapidated 1980s-style pool and a family that wants a beautiful yard where they can cook outside. They rip out the old pool and build a Tuscan beauty with multiple overflows and glass detail work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet Of The Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having
programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso falls in love with a sourdough cinnamon roll in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: A Whole Beast of Flavor
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood sop up the sauce in Charleston, S.C., as they discover the pleasures of whole hog barbecue with legendary pitmaster, Rodney Scott. Then they are on to one of the best burgers in America.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Twists With Genuine Bite
programme.desc: Rutledge Wood make their way to Treylor Park in Savannah for their spicy shrimp-and-grits tacos.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Orleans Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a culinary walk through New Orleans' French Quarter for this brunch that's perfect anytime of the day.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Diner Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay dresses up classic diner dishes like chocolate hazelnut s'more French toast, baked pumpkin oatmeal with a cinnamon crisp and an anything-goes style pasta scramble with breakfast sausage, eggs, kale and tomatoes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch in Bloom
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Chowchilla-Madera to Ciao!
programme.desc: In the tiny town of Chowchilla, CA Noah Cappe discovers some carnival eats that deserve to be shared with the world. First up, it's the Deep Pit Barbeque, a meat extravaganza that takes three days to prepare.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: The Closer: Waivers of Extradition
programme.desc: After the stabbing death of a woman who was apparently killed by someone wearing a ninja outfit, Brenda and the squad realize they might have a bigger case on their hands than they thought.

programme.title: The Closer: The Life
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a 12-year-old boy found dead in a known gang party house. The case is soon complicated when two more bodies are found at a different yet related house. Meanwhile, trouble brews in Provenza's romantic paradise.

programme.title: The Closer: Make Over
programme.desc: Several old cases that were previously closed are suddenly re-opened after a crime lab is discredited. Provenza's former partner, Det. Andrews, comes out of retirement to help with a case involving artwork theft and murder.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Built for Speed

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: The squad rushes to solve a violent homicide case muddied by conflicting evidence. Maura is burdened with the major decision of whether to take in her recently paroled grandfather.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Tears of a Clown
programme.desc: When a kidnapper dressed as a clown re-emerges in Boston after more than 20 years, the squad is struck with fear. Desperate for clues, they dig through files from the unsolved abductions of the haunting 1988 'Summer of the Clown.'

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Just Push Play
programme.desc: A singer and guitar player is brutally and mysteriously stabbed in a bar. As details emerge in the case, the squad soon realizes that the victim had something to hide. Meanwhile, Jane's dad returns with shocking news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Food for Thought
programme.desc: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve Boston's most twisted cases.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: In 1982 the first of over 50 victims of America's most prolific serial killer were discovered. After being at large for two decades, 'forensic microscopy' was used to link the women to the killer.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murder in Vegas
programme.desc: A burnt antique trunk was found in the Nevada desert in 1995, filled with charred bones and a skull with five bullet holes. Investigators convicted the killer with help from a method used in the era of Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: OG Armdrop
programme.desc: MSO fights for a win with just half of their team in round two of JJ's small-tire race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: Nashville street racers call out the MSO to see who really runs the streets of Tennessee. Memphis never backs down from a challenge, but with Ziptie out of commission and Heifer having trouble, the team must really step up if they want to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Liars!
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The MSO is called out by a group from Delaware that turns out to be a team of revenge-hungry all-stars from around the country that have suffered losses at the hands of Memphis.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Don't Rain On My Parade
programme.desc: The MSO continues their battle against an all-star group of racers out to avenge past losses on the streets of Memphis. Then NOLA makes moves on the 405 and Lizzy Musi joins Grudge Night for the first time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The Hiltz Auto Company team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream. Using Chad's vintage toys as inspiration and utilizing Colton's improved welding skills, the team converts a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a unique, functioning dump truck.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: They Call Me Bad Chad
programme.desc: Chad builds a one-of-a-kind coupe with square parts, recycled metal, and a 1939 Studebaker Commander.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Trapped Tractor Rescue
programme.desc: A man trapped under a tractor is in danger of drowning. A motorcyclists collide with a deer.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Pig Farm Fracture
programme.desc: Paramedics and airborne doctors of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance crew go to the rescue of a teenage boy who fell through the roof of a barn, fracturing his skull. Also, the chopper touches down to aide a student in a serious bicycling accident.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Beginning of the End?
programme.desc: The crew of the Infinity is in the Marshall Islands preparing for one of the most dangerous expeditions known to man: sailing farther north than any sail ship ever has. If they don't leave in time, they risk being locked in arctic ice for ten months.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Narrow Escape
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy braves gators in the Florida night to snatch a party boy's Cessna Float plane. Kevin Lacy enrols a vengeful divorcé for a high-altitude, high-risk heist in Colorado and Ken and Danny have a close encounter with an angry debtor's shovel.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Alone in Alaska
programme.desc: Adrenalin junkie Mike Kennedy boldly sets out into the remote Alaskan wilderness, braving wolf country and bitter temperatures, in a hunt for a Piper Super Cub.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Undercover and Out of Time
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy teams up in Southern California to snatch a plane in broad daylight, Kevin Lacey poses as a Cajun pilot to heist a $2-million prize and Ken Cage finds himself facing high winds and the threat of F-16s to make his payday.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Collision
programme.desc: Extreme turbulence over the Teton Range threatens disaster for Mike Kennedy, but a second crack at a $3-million Citation V offers Ken Cage and Danny Thompson a shot at redemption.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Roulette
programme.desc: Stuntman turned Repo Pilot Mike Kennedy skydives into an airfield to snatch a Dehavilland Twin Otter airplane. Later, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson make a risky two-vehicle snatch from a wealthy playboy.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Pit Crew/ Pups Fight Fire
