programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Too Fast, Too Curious
programme.desc: Dave finds something that has him baffled while Ivy attempts an elusive strategy to make a score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Once Upon a Locker in the West
programme.desc: The buyers head to Santa Ana, CA where dreams of great lockers spice up the auction. Jarrod and Brandi get a locker that leads to the sweet life while Mary tries to get something more collectable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locker Mountain High
programme.desc: The auctions begin in Upland, California, but Dan and Laura take the buyers on a wild ride to finish out the day. Ivy ends up with an eyeful, and Mary buys early in hopes of treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fontan-o-rama
programme.desc: Fontana, CA becomes FUNtana as Dave explores his lighter side and Mary tries to put a little 'Texas' into the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mr. Nezhoda's Opus
programme.desc: Dan and Laura take the buyers back to Torrance for an auction that has them battling for the best unit of the day. Ivy changes up his game to stunning results, Brandi puts Jarrod on a harsh budget and Dave takes on Rene against every locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Leader of the Packed
programme.desc: Bellflower, CA hosts an auction that has high stakes and big money finds. Ivy struggles through a bad buy to find something of value, while Dave tries to find trash among the treasure. Jarrod buys a unit that becomes a horror show for Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Padian: P.I.
programme.desc: Ivy is excited to return to an area known for the items he needs, but Jarrod and Brandi must employ sharp strategy to get a good locker. Darrel and Brandon are looking to score heavy which puts Mary at the bottom hoping for a top unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Thrill of a Kitty and the Agony of Smoked Meat
programme.desc: Darrell tries to smoke the competition and proves that sometimes treasure can look like trash. Mary struggles to wrangle information from the more experienced buyers, but Rene is not looking to share first place in the hunt for the best locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Sweet Sniff of Success
programme.desc: The buyers head to West Covina, where everyone is vying to be top dog. Jarrod and Brandi bring an expert to sniff out the best lockers. Darrell and Brandon help everyone at the auction dress for success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There Will Be Blood Money
programme.desc: Brandi does her best to stay positive for Jarrod, while Dave is out for blood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: It's All Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Ivy has no problem spending his bucks for the right locker. Darrell and Brandon have got a hunger they need to feed.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Packed, Stacked and All Trash?
programme.desc: Auctions in Costa Mesa bring out the best and worst of the buyers as everyone tries to score a great buy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bozek Is My Spirit Animal
programme.desc: There are treasures for some and turmoil for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: What Cowboy Dreams May Come
programme.desc: Santa Ana is Dave Hester's old stomping grounds, and he plays it to his diabolical advantage as he makes the other buyers struggle to get a decent locker. Jarrod and Brandi can't seem to get on their game, while Rene has to hit hard to get a unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Too Many Cooks in the Locker
programme.desc: The buyers head to Ivy's home turf of Lancaster, where Mary tries to strike a deal with a surprising ally. Jarrod and Brandi turn up the heat on the competition and each other, while Rene goes well outside of his territory to prove his dominance.

programme.title: Storage Wars: They'll Always Have Perris
programme.desc: The valley of Perris, CA hosts an early morning auction that has the buyers waking up early and watching their bids.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tinseltown Tussle
programme.desc: North Hollywood sets the scene for another auction filled with dreams of hitting it big. Mary gets a leg up on the competition with a not so secret weapon.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Ivy for the Win
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the dollars get higher as the buyers attend a first class auction in Arcadia, CA. Dave targets Jarrod and Brandi and the sparks begin to fly.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High Stakes and Low Blows
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, home to some of the biggest finds and worst dramas. Ivy has never hit it big here so he is focused on a good score no matter the cost. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi are determined to not let another big locker get away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: The Misery Index: This Is Not a Drill!
programme.desc: Contestants trash talk the Tenderloins, Sal's 'moist moment,' and a giant door-opening python.

programme.title: The Misery Index: UK vs US Special
programme.desc: After some heated UK vs US banter, Jameela and the Tenderloins find out once and for all which of these great nations is truly the most miserable. Plus, Jameela has a big surprise fail for the Tenderloins.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: HellCopter
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as unreceptive receptionists in an office waiting room, then head to a wax museum where they mingle with the stiff crowd. And in tonight’s double punishment, two losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World
programme.desc: After two officers are murdered by a highly trained and knowledgeable killer, Voight struggles to keep the case contained. At the same time, Lindsay confronts Antonio about his new job.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dial 'N' for Nerder

programme.title: The Simpsons: Smoke on the Daughter

programme.title: The Simpsons: All About Lisa

programme.title: The Simpsons: Double Double Boy in Trouble

programme.desc: Leo Barnes has become head of security for Senator Charlene Roan, who has vowed to end the Purge. The government opposes this and the New Founding Fathers force her and Leo out onto the streets. They must survive what could be the final Purge.

programme.title: Movie: Annihilation
programme.desc: After her husband emerges from an environmental disaster zone with a mysterious illness. a biologist enters the area to try to find the source of his infection. Within the contained area, she discovers that the rules of nature have gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: Law & Order: Judge Dread

programme.title: Law & Order: Deep Vote
programme.desc: A poor case of mistaken identity leads to the murder of a struggling businesswoman.

programme.title: Law & Order: Who Let the Dogs Out
programme.desc: The detectives are called to the scene of a vicious dog attack/ killing in Central Park.

programme.title: Law & Order: Armed Forces
programme.desc: Vietnam veterans are questioned about the murder of a veteran from their former unit.

programme.title: Law & Order: For Love or Money
programme.desc: The detectives investigate both the widow and daughter of a wealthy murder victim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Soldier of Fortune

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Hard Time

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Shattered Mirror

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Muse

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: For the Cause

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Quickening

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: To the Death

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Body Parts
programme.desc: When Quark is misdiagnosed with a terminal illness, he sells his body parts in advance.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Broken Links

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Apocalypse Rising

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Ship

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Looking for Par'mach in All the Wrong Places
programme.desc: Worf helps Quark woo a visiting Klingon woman despite the fact he himself loves her.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Gambit
programme.desc: A shocked Riker finds a missing and presumed dead Picard, posing as a mercenary.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Gambit
programme.desc: Picard and Riker masquerade as mercenaries in order to retrieve a Vulcan artifact.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Phantasms

programme.desc: Dr. Oakley travels to Alaska and helps various animals through the various seasons of Alaska.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Whoa, Baby!
programme.desc: Whoa, Baby! Dr. Oakley is on the move in Alaska tending to all needs baby related.

programme.desc: It is the dog days of Alaska as Dr. Michelle Oakley pays a visit to various Alaskan pooches.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley isn’t afraid to take risks when it comes to treating her patients.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: All Sheeps and Sizes
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley needs to get creative to treat her patients in the Yukon.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: What's Up, Doc?
programme.desc: With temperatures blazing in Michigan, Dr. Pol and his team are busier than ever helping animals in need. With a full list, Dr. Pol needs to treat his sickest patients first.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Gallop Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team visit a local breeder to check on her limping horse, DooBee.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: We revisit one of Michigans hottest summers and see how the sweltering heat is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: New Dog, Pol Tricks
programme.desc: On this popped episode, it's birthing season in Michigan, which means Dr. Pol and his clinic staff have their hands full.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Cosmic Plague Curse
programme.desc: An Apollo astronaut suddenly and strangely becomes sick while on the moon, experts wonder if the cause of his unusual illness originated on Earth or somewhere else. That possibility echoes one of NASA's greatest fears about the space missions.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Alien Arrival
programme.desc: Scientists and other experts unravel the hypothetical scenario of an actual alien invasion and contemplate whether such an advanced technology would be used as a gift of peace or a catastrophic weapon against humanity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Alien Arrival
programme.desc: Scientists and other experts unravel the hypothetical scenario of an actual alien invasion and contemplate whether such an advanced technology would be used as a gift of peace or a catastrophic weapon against humanity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killing of Officer Green
programme.desc: A California police officer is shot dead in his home. His ex-wife admits she pulled the trigger. A photo on social media may have led to the death.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: Tammie Craycraft Smith, a 30-year-old recent divorcee, finds herself working two jobs to make ends meet. But Tammie's trusting nature and desire to be loved leave her vulnerable to deception, betrayal, and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killing of Officer Green
programme.desc: A California police officer is shot dead in his home. His ex-wife admits she pulled the trigger. A photo on social media may have led to the death.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: Tammie Craycraft Smith, a 30-year-old recent divorcee, finds herself working two jobs to make ends meet. But Tammie's trusting nature and desire to be loved leave her vulnerable to deception, betrayal, and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Home Invasion
programme.desc: 26-year-old Julie Curry Boyd took the steps to separate her and her children from a marriage of 13 years. A sudden threat finds Julie desperate but determined to keep her family safe.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Prophet
programme.desc: To Kevin Currie, Mormon prophet Jeffrey Lundgren was more than a spiritual leader, he was a brother. But before long, Kevin realized that this Man of God was really a devil in disguise with an evil plan.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Season's Grievings
programme.desc: After a night at karaoke, a pretty nurse vanishes into the frigid Wisconsin winter. Security footage reveals the woman left with a mystery man in a dark jacket. What detectives uncover is the coldest of crimes and a monstrous end to a beautiful life.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Cold Heart
programme.desc: On a snowy Wisconsin morning, an 18-year-old mother is found beaten, stabbed and strangled to death with her 3 month old son as her only witness. Leads soon grow cold and the chase for a suspect leads detectives to a vicious killer who's close to home.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly winter morning in St. Louis, an eleven year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. She's been brutally murdered. It's a race against time for investigators who fear the elusive killer will strike again.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lies, Lawns & Murder
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a retired Vietnam veteran sells off a piece of his land to a young family. No one can predict the modern day Hatfield McCoy neighbor feud that will ensue and the midnight shootout that will end it.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lake of Madness
programme.desc: A family moves into their dream home on a Minnesota lake, and welcomes the single retiree who soon takes up residence next door. But a dispute over access to the water they all love escalates until one party snaps, and others pay the price in blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bonfire of Blood
programme.desc: An argument about access to a disputed road puts two Lompico, California men at each other's throats. Things progress from intimidation and property damage to a backhoe attack and, finally, one of the most shocking murders the area has ever seen.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Wave to Daddy
programme.desc: The daughter of one of America's most notorious killers gives an exclusive interview, taking us on a journey into the eyes of a cold-blooded monster. Never-before-seen footage reveals the devastating double life of a murderer and his horrific crimes.

programme.title: American Monster: Shooting Phoenix
programme.desc: A monster stalks the summer streets of Phoenix in 2005. With never-before-seen footage, we get a glimpse into the killer's life and how he's able to hide in plain sight. Can police catch him before he strikes again?

programme.title: American Monster: Off-Camera
programme.desc: An obsessive video blogger and mother of five shares every detail of her rollercoaster life with her husband and their children online. But one night, intruders tie her up and kidnap her husband and execute him. It seems someone has been keeping secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Tiers
programme.desc: A Texas couple building their dream home wants a pool with one-of-a-kind architecture that's also kid-friendly for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Caribbean
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on the island of Roatan, a couple has decided to just build the Caribbean in their back yard. The team design a curvilinear pool with infinity edge, a sunken bar area, six water figures and a beach like they've ever built.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For the Whole Family
programme.desc: Chase and the team come in to rebuild and ultimately repair this cabin for Laurence and his family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Changing of the Guard's Camp
programme.desc: Recently Jeff and his wife Leah inherited the cabin he grew up in from his mother but it has been dormant for nearly 10 years and needs some major repairs and upgrades.

programme.desc: Flipping friends, Jenn and Jen are going to have to know their rights when they go up against cop cousins, Tom and Mike.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: The Balloon of Doom
programme.desc: Best friends April and Jenn battle against married couple Mark and Veronica.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Full-Contact Flipping
programme.desc: Kim, a professional female football player and her best friend Leslie share a love for flea markets. They'll take on designing dudes Ron and Peter.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: A Chandelier Made of a Metal Orb Against a Sink Transformed Into a Mini Bar
programme.desc: Sisters encounter stylist friends in a battle of flipping.

programme.desc: Theatrical designers go up against two floral designers.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Battle of the Roomies
programme.desc: Great friends Travis and Sydney take on the spunky duo of Gina and Lindsey.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Team USA vs. Team Canada: Bring Your Eh Game
programme.desc: Canadian craftsmen, Austin and Moh are bringing their 'eh' game against style-savvy American couple Lauren and Scott.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: 'Til Death Do Us Flip
programme.desc: The husband and wife team Al and Merry, duke it out with best friends Erika and Evey.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Are Horseshoes Really Lucky?
programme.desc: Upcycling husband and wife team, Jeff and Ilana take on flipping friends Jeannine and Robin. The fun begins when each team gets $500 and only one hour to find pieces that need a little TLC at the Elephant's Trunk Flea Market in New Milford, Connecticut.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Beam Log Cabin Experiment
programme.desc: Mark clients want bigger and bigger antique log homes, but pioneers didn't build big log cabins. They did build big barns though, so the guys try and build a 1200 sq. foot cabin using barn beams from their inventory.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Out of the Ashes: Rebuilding in Gatlinburg, Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Gatlinburg to replace a log home lost in the 2016 wildfires.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen In Brevard, Nc
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber frame kitchen that will be the centerpiece of a high-end mountain retreat in Brevard, NC. Later, Mark and the guys visit some of the architect's other spectacular log homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fighting the Elements to Build a Well House, and Repairing a Damaged Log Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to their roots in Asheville, North Carolina. They have one day to build a log well house in the driving rain. Once it's up, they have to repair a severely damaged log home nearby.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally turns this old show about pate a choux into what it always should have been: an episode about chocolate eclairs. That means a new pastry cream and a chocolate glaze.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard I: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fish-and-chips show with a brand-new recipe for French fries and fish sticks.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle
programme.desc: Andrew digs into Raleigh, Durham and Chapel Hill- three tasty cities that make up North Carolina's Triangle. A hub for higher education with a booming tech industry, this region is home to a blossoming food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Heston's Fantastical Food: Pub Pie
programme.desc: Heston tries to put the fun back into the food and drink of the great British pub.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace
programme.desc: Michael McKean gets caught in the middle of some culinary conflicts as he uncovers some very delicious details. He solves the Cuban Missile Crisis with chop suey, runs the redcoats out with cornbread and keeps the peace with a little kimchi.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Michael McKean turns our plates into a playground as he finds out the stories behind some famously fun foods! He'll spell out a solution to the Great Depression using alphabet soup and more.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit
programme.desc: Michael McKean is all berets and baguettes as he digs into a few of France's most fantastic feasts. He crosses the pond to see if crepes could nearly kill a king.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Good Eats: This Spud's for You
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown ponders the potato and its main ingredient: starch. The Baked Potato, Mashers and Potato/Portobello Gratin are examined.

programme.title: Good Eats: Salad Daze
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown goes back to salad basics and pays homage to Caesar and Veni Vedi Vinaigrette.

programme.title: Good Eats: Churn Baby Churn

programme.title: Good Eats: Gravy Confidential
programme.desc: Alton conquers the gravy train and makes it smooth and lump free.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.desc: When an explosion kills a marine colonel on a military golf course, the team must work together with the Army Criminal Investigative Unit to find the killer. A CIA tip leads them to an abandoned warehouse rigged to explode with a cellphone.

programme.title: NCIS: Once a Hero
programme.desc: The team investigates when an honoured marine veteran falls to his death at a hotel. After determining his death was not a suicide, the team discovers that he was homeless but living at the hotel with the help of a maintenance man who was a fellow vet.

programme.title: NCIS: Parental Guidance Suggested

programme.title: NCIS: The Searchers
programme.desc: After investigating the murder of a retired master sergeant, the team uncovers a fraudulent charity that preys on those searching for missing military personnel. Meanwhile, Bishop agonizes over the results of her probation evaluation.

programme.title: NCIS: Semper Fortis

programme.title: NCIS: Grounded

programme.title: NCIS: House Rules

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup

programme.title: Frasier: Ask Me No Questions

programme.title: Frasier: Odd Man Out

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Imaginary Friend

programme.desc: Solving the murder of a jogger takes on even greater urgency when Jane realizes that the motive was theft of the woman's baby. As the investigation gets underway, Jane attempts to hide her pregnancy from her snooping mother.

programme.desc: A woman arrives at the station covered in blood, carrying a gun and saying she killed someone. Due to the trauma of what she did, she has forgotten who she is and who the victim is. The team tries to unravel this bizarre case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Too Good to Be True

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Doomsday
programme.desc: When a man is found murdered inside his supposedly impenetrable doomsday fallout shelter, the squad must figure out how and why he was targeted. Jane discovers Korsak is looking into retirement.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a wealthy woman with terminal cancer and only a few months left to live. Maura is torn between the doubts of her scientific mind and the instincts of her heart.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Spaces of Hope: Oscar Mike Foundation
programme.desc: On this special episode of Designing Spaces: Spaces of Hope, we're at the Oscar Mike Foundation compound, a home base for disabled veterans.

programme.title: The Closer: Dead Man's Hand
programme.desc: Captain Raydor approaches Major Crime about looking into a possible case of spousal abuse involving one of her female officers. Brenda and Raydor discover there is more to the story when another officer kills the abused woman's husband.

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Bang
programme.desc: The shooting death of a man taking pictures of the stars from his balcony leads the squad to look closely at the husband of the woman with whom the victim was having an affair. The investigation is hindered by a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: The Closer: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Captain Raydor accompanies Brenda on an investigation involving the disappearance of a nanny working for close friends of the mayor. They discover that what they may have on their hands is a serial rapist armed with a stun gun.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Lost and Found
programme.desc: The team races against time to find a young witness to the contract killing of a woman outside of a nightclub. Ultimately, Jane puts herself in the line of fire to save this witness' life.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Zemanek/ Brandon
programme.desc: A cosmetics industry executive and wife from Florida, who proudly admits that first impressions and appearances are important, swaps places with a Halloween-loving wife who drives around in a hearse and displays a coffin in her family's living room.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Lawrence and Caddel
programme.desc: Meet Big Mama Lawrence, a fundamentalist mother who places religion and family before everything else. Big Mama swaps places with Marlo 'Jinxi' Caddel, a career-driven mother and a proud atheist with alternative values.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Silver/ Pitney
programme.desc: A pushover mom whose life is run by her wild kids and her gambling husband rolls the dice and swaps lives with a domineering psychic medium mom.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Atlanta Bombings
programme.desc: In 1996, one person was killed and hundreds were injured when a bomb went off at the Atlanta Olympics. Five more bombs would be detonated, and the FBI, ATF and GBI realize they are looking for a serial bomber.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murdered Bride
programme.desc: A case quickly goes cold for the LAPD in 1986 until 20 years later when DNA testing provides a new lead. The initial investigation searched for a male killer, but the DNA results reveal that they are looking for a woman.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor, and Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack. Sig and Mandy try to get Jake to do their prospecting, but he fills his own tanks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: I Quit: Going All In
programme.desc: Esrever wine company owners juggle day jobs while trying to expand, and young newlyweds gamble on their new clothing company, Versattire. Blue Coolers is dealt a serious setback. Mike D sacrifices family time. Klado struggles to focus a business plan.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Beginning of the End?
programme.desc: The crew of the Infinity is in the Marshall Islands preparing for one of the most dangerous expeditions known to man: sailing farther north than any sail ship ever has. If they don't leave in time, they risk being locked in arctic ice for ten months.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut

programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Breaking the Ice
programme.desc: After surviving the tumultuous summer season, the miners must now prepare their operations for the harsh winter looming on the horizon when temperatures plummet and the sea becomes an endless sheet of ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A regulator freeze-up cuts off Shawn's air supply just days into the winter mining season. Vernon returns to the ice aiming to buy Claim 16, while Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: The Dope of Oregon
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Jim Belushi is adding another expertise to his repertoire: cannabis farmer! Jim learns the hard way that the 'I'll do it myself' mentality leads to mistakes. Later, Jim discovers that his family's support for his new endeavor is waning.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Blue Moonshine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill are forced back to their day jobs after their shine runs blue. Chico, under financial stress, makes a hard decision that could risk it all. Tickle struggles to keep Tim's old territory supplied. Mark and Jeff move their liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rival Shiners
programme.desc: Tim reaches a milestone with his first bottled batch of shine. Jeff and Mark suspect a rival in their territory. Chico takes a risk that could cost him everything. Josh and Bill's only hope at financing their shine operation is to consider bootlegging.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootlegging Blowups
programme.desc: Tim enlists Tickle's help to investigate his new still hand, Chico. Josh and Bill take on new risks as they try to stay alive in the moonshine game as bootleggers. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine War
programme.desc: Tickle goes undercover in Kentucky to find out what Chico has been up to. Josh and Bill hit the open road to bootleg shine at a music festival, but they soon hit a violent roadblock. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition with one shot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Firewater
programme.desc: Josh and Bill suffer the consequences of bootlegging. Darlene goes against her best instinct and lights up her still indoors. Jeff, Mark and Lance find their competition is still out there. Tim takes final measures to protect his legal shine business.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Aftershock
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark look to cash in on one final run of the season. Tickle and Chico's still site is compromised. Mike is desperate to complete his New Orleans order and turns to Darlene. Josh and Bill might get to sell some of their own liquor after all.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Liquid Courage
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark reach the ultimate roadblock, and Deputy Chuck is hot on a trail. Josh and Bill might finally be back in the game. Mike takes a trip to finish off his biggest sale of the season. Tickle and crew attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Welcome to Thunderdome
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life compete for glory and $25,000 cash in an arena unlike any other. A dodgeball deity tests his mettle. A fitness model shows she can do more than just look the part. 'Aaron Rodgers' tries his hand at a brand-new ballgame.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Bouncy House
programme.desc: Dena is a gourmet chef who will cook her own wedding feast, while Jen will have a barbeque truck and ice cream man dish out the food.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Chocolate Handcuffs
programme.desc: Kate picks recycled wedding décor and has no favours at her earth-friendly party, while cop Jennifer splurges on chocolate handcuff favours.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Multiple Aftershocks
programme.desc: Deon manages the household of 11 children while Karen goes on bed rest in the hospital. When an earthquake shakes up Las Vegas, however, the Derricos' plans to carry the triplets to 32 weeks goes completely awry.

programme.title: Counting On: Highs and Lows
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy share the sad news that they have miscarried their baby. In Arkansas, Ben has second thoughts as he undergoes eye surgery. Later, Jeremy throws Jinger a surprise party filled with some unexpected guests and a special gift.

programme.title: Counting On: The Best Duggar Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: It's Christmas with the Duggars! Jana and Jessa organize a Christmas pageant, and the whole family pitches in to pull it off -- including Jim Bob, who has a very special role. In LA, Jinger and Jeremy cut down their first live Christmas tree together.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Triple Jeopardy
programme.desc: The family experiences life after the birth of the latest set of multiples -- the triplets. While everyone is overjoyed when two babies finally make it home, Karen and Deon struggle to find courage as Awesome Dawsyn's heart surgery date approaches.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: New Year, New Responsibilities
programme.desc: Danielle starts the new year with a chore chart, teaching the kids to help around the house. This might remedy her exhaustion or increase the quints' tantrums. The girls take part in a fashion show. The Busbys hope they land their runway walk.

programme.desc: Bill surprises the family with a fun, activity-packed camping trip. Although Jen convinces Bill to rent a camper, she worries about the dangers lurking in the Florida wilderness, from alligators to poisonous plants and everything in between!

programme.title: The Little Couple: This Is How We Party
programme.desc: Zoey's dream comes true as she and her best friend have a special mermaid encounter. Then, Bill and Jen throw a big summer party for all her friends but have to scramble when an unexpected Florida rainstorm threatens to ruin their big event.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Toddlers and Turkeys
programme.desc: Courtney and the babies are running late to Kayleigh's wedding because of a dead car battery. The Waldrop family moves 11 people into a 1,500 square foot mobile home during construction, right before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: 30,000 Dirty Diapers
programme.desc: The Waldrops are feeling a little cramped in their mobile home as construction starts on their house. Courtney wants to combine nine birthdays and potty train six toddlers.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: She's Gone
programme.desc: Two sisters are searching for their birth mother, and ask Chris to help them uncover the reason for their adoption. Then, Lisa helps a mother find the daughters she placed for adoption, with hopes of answering some of her burning questions.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: An Adult Orphan
programme.desc: Lisa hopes that locating a man's biological mother will finally allow him to overcome his lifelong struggle with abandonment. Chris is tasked with locating a woman's only child and delivering the difficult details of her daughter's birth story.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Why Couldn't They Raise Us?
programme.desc: Identical twins enlist Lisa's help to unlock the mystery of why they were placed for adoption. Chris hopes to fulfill the wishes of a deceased father by tracking down the first-born son he and his wife placed for adoption when they were young lovers.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Switched in the Hospital

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Puppy Paradise
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray helps two homeowners whose secluded, lakefront home suffered a flood. With help from designer Debra Salmoni, Scott works to transform their rundown money pit into a pet-cation getaway for animal lovers and their furry family members.

programme.desc: Scott McGillivray and Debra Salmoni brew up something big as they transform an inherited property into a perfect Alpine-inspired haven. New homeowners Bernd and Crystal need Scott's contracting expertise and Debra's creative design ideas.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
